mods.name: Brighter Ward Spots
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Recolors the ward spot markers painted on the map into a bright gold glow so they are much easier to see.

mods.name: Click Through Top Bar
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Lets right clicks pass through the whole top bar, the hero portraits, the kda numbers, the clock and the creep score, so it stops blocking right click movement near the top of the screen. Left clicks and alt click pings still work like normal.

mods.name: Compact Menu Chat
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Shrinks the main menu chat and user list into a compact box in the bottom right and adds a button above it that hides or shows the chat.

mods.name: Astrolabe Range Ring
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Shows the Astrolabe heal radius around the carrier at all times while the item is held using the games own cast indicator ring.

mods.name: Moon Queen Moon Finale Range Ring
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Shows the Moon Finale radius around Moon Queen at all times using the games own cast indicator ring.

mods.name: Pharaoh Wall of Mummies Range Ring
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Shows the Wall of Mummies ring around Pharaoh at all times using the games own cast indicator ring.

mods.name: Riftwalker Wormhole Range Ring
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Shows the Wormhole cast range around Riftwalker at all times using the games own cast indicator ring.

mods.name: Soul Reaper Judgement Range Ring
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Shows the Judgement radius around Soul Reaper at all times using the games own cast indicator ring.

mods.name: Soulstealer Demon Hand Range Rings
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Shows the three Demon Hand ranges around Soulstealer at all times using the games own cast indicator ring.

mods.name: Tower Range Rings
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Shows the attack range around every tower at all times using the games own cast indicator ring.

mods.name: Custom Cursor Ember
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Replaces the default pointer with a warm gradient arrow. Adjust the size in Options with the cursor size slider.

mods.name: Custom Cursor Frost
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Replaces the default pointer with a blue gradient arrow. Adjust the size in Options with the cursor size slider.

mods.name: Custom Cursor Void
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Replaces the default pointer with a violet gradient arrow. Adjust the size in Options with the cursor size slider.

mods.name: Rhapsody Melody Range Ring
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Shows the Protective Melody radius around Rhapsody at all times using the games own cast indicator ring.

mods.name: Remove Death Screen Effects
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Removes the fullscreen overlays shown while you are dead so your screen stays clear.

mods.name: Tree Stumps
mods.author: Doogle
mods.description: Replaces the map trees with small stumps for a clearer view of the battlefield.
